title: Arch-Engine Capability Descriptor Schema
description: Defines the canonical schema for capability descriptors used in federation negotiation, overlay admission, and compatibility matrix evaluation. This schema is the authority referenced by 'Registry descriptor schema version: v1' in the release envelope.

schemaVersion.description: Descriptor schema version. Changes require major version bump per API freeze contract.

descriptorId.description: Unique identifier for this capability descriptor.

capability.description: Name of the capability this descriptor defines.

required.description: Whether this capability is required for seam resolution.

minimumTrustTier.description: Minimum trust tier a provider must hold to satisfy this descriptor.

compatibilityVersion.description: Compatibility version for matrix evaluation. Providers must match this version.

compatibilityRules.description: Compatibility matrix rules for this descriptor.

compatible.description: List of descriptor IDs that are compatible with this descriptor.

incompatible.description: List of descriptor IDs that are incompatible with this descriptor.

providerRequirements.description: Requirements a provider must satisfy for this descriptor.

signatureRequired.description: Whether the provider must present a valid signature envelope.

registryOriginRequired.description: Whether the provider must originate from a known registry.

namespaceOwnershipRequired.description: Whether the provider must own its declared namespace.
